requirements: Build a student attendance management system

user_stories.title: Student Attendance Marking
user_stories.goal: Mark attendance for students in a class
acceptance_criteria: As a teacher, I can mark attendance for all students in a class
Attendance marks are saved and persist in the system
Attendance reports can be generated for a specific class and date range

user_stories.title: Student Attendance Viewing
user_stories.benefit: Students can monitor their attendance and take action if necessary
acceptance_criteria: Students can view their attendance records for the current semester
Students can view their attendance records for previous semesters
Students can download or print their attendance records

user_stories.title: Student Attendance Notifications
user_stories.benefit: Parents/guardians are informed of attendance issues
acceptance_criteria: Parents/guardians receive notifications when a student has excessive absences
Parents/guardians can view their child's attendance records online
Parents/guardians can receive attendance notifications via email or SMS

design_artifacts.summary: Mark attendance for students in a class

code_artifacts.summary: Mark attendance for students in a class

test_artifacts.coverage_focus: Mark attendance for students in a class
